objective:
OpenCodex의 OpenAI 공급자 체계를 완전히 하드닝한다. 최종 사용자 계약은 세 개로 고정한다: (1) provider id openai = Codex Direct, 호출자/메인 Codex 로그인만 사용하고 계정 풀·쿼터 회전·failover를 절대 타지 않는다. (2) provider id openai-multi = Codex Multi-account, 메인 계정을 반드시 후보 풀에 포함하고 추가 계정과 함께 affinity, quota, cooldown, failover, outcome recording을 사용한다. (3) provider id openai-apikey = OpenAI API, API key/key pool만 사용하고 Codex 계정 인증과 섞이지 않는다. OpenAI API에는 gpt-5.6, Sol/Terra/Luna와 API 전용 가상 선택지 gpt-5.6-sol-pro, gpt-5.6-terra-pro, gpt-5.6-luna-pro를 제공한다. 가상 id는 picker/history/log에 보존하고 outbound에서만 base model + reasoning.mode=pro로 변환한다. 공식 API 메타데이터인 1,050,000 context, 922,000 max input, text/image 입력, low-max Codex 지원 effort 교집합을 반영하고 auto-compaction이 max input을 넘지 않게 한다.

작업 범위는 devlog/_plan/260717_openai_hardening의 docs-only roadmap lock과 010 provider tier/config/migration, 020 route-aware auth across HTTP/WS/compact/outcomes, 030 API catalog/virtual aliases, 040 management GUI/i18n/sidecar ownership, 050 integration tests/SoT/runtime verification이다. 각 decade 문서는 정확히 하나의 PABCD work-phase로 실행한다. 다른 jawcode 공급자, 가격 UI, Programmatic Tool Calling, prompt-cache UI, persisted-reasoning UI, 임의 사용자 request-body transform, release/deploy/push는 제외한다. 로컬 커밋은 단계별로 만들되 push하지 않는다.

DONE은 모든 goalplan criteria가 fresh evidence와 함께 met이고 FSM이 마지막 D를 거쳐 IDLE이며, focused tests, bun x tsc --noEmit, bun test, GUI lint:i18n/build, Direct/Multi/API mock transport matrix, WebSocket/compact/sidecar activation cases, migration negative cases가 통과하고 README/docs SoT가 코드와 일치하는 상태다. 기존 키가 안전하게 확인되는 경우에만 API live smoke를 최대 4개의 짧은 요청(각 입력 1,000 tokens 미만, 비밀·프롬프트 로그 금지)으로 실행한다. 키가 없으면 live API smoke는 BLOCKED가 아니라 NOT RUN credential unavailable로 기록하고 mock outbound proof를 필수로 남긴다. NOOP은 현재 트리가 이미 모든 계약과 검증을 만족할 때만 가능하다. BLOCKED는 외부 의존성으로 3회 연속 진전이 불가능할 때, UNSAFE는 인증/마이그레이션 안전성을 보장할 수 없을 때, NEEDS_HUMAN은 기존 요구와 충돌하는 판단이 새로 생길 때, BUDGET_EXHAUSTED는 work-phase당 120분 또는 동일 실패 3회 한도를 실제로 넘겼을 때만 사용한다.

도구 범위는 이 로컬 저장소, cxc FSM/goalplan, 공식 OpenAI 문서, 로컬 Bun/TypeScript 테스트와 브라우저 QA다. 쓰기 범위는 저장소와 .codexclaw goalplan/ledger뿐이며 사용자 자격증명 파일은 읽기 최소화·수정 금지다. 파괴적 config 변경, 외부 계정 생성, 배포, 원격 push는 금지한다. 첫 work-phase는 이미 작성된 docs-only roadmap을 현재 코드와 공식 문서에 다시 대조해 Audit 가능한 상태로 잠그는 것이다.

tasks.title: Revalidate current architecture and official OpenAI contract
Pass independent roadmap audit and close docs-only PABCD cycle
Add typed tier policy without public registry activation
Add pure one-time migration projection and focused tests

workPhases.title: Atomic three-tier activation and route-aware authentication

tasks.title: Activate registry, routing, management admission, migration, and legacy chatgpt retirement atomically
Make HTTP, WebSocket frames, and compact auth resolve after routing
Activate Multi native catalog and gate quota/outcome/failover to Multi

workPhases.title: OpenAI API GPT-5.6 metadata and Pro virtual models

tasks.title: Apply official API context, max-input, modality, and effort metadata
Add exactly three trusted API-only Pro virtual aliases
Preserve selected identity and rewrite only the outbound request

workPhases.title: Management API, GUI, i18n, and deterministic sidecars

tasks.title: Expose three distinct tier presets, DTOs, cards, and model groups
Update all locale copy and Codex Accounts ownership guidance
Make search/image sidecar provider selection deterministic

workPhases.title: Integration hardening, SoT sync, runtime evidence, and closeout

tasks.title: Run full three-tier transport and negative-case regression matrix
Update README and model catalog source-of-truth documentation
Run full gates, GUI QA, runtime smokes, and record final evidence

criteria.scenario: Every implementation work-phase has a dependency-ordered diff-level decade document
criteria.expectedEvidence: 000_plan.md plus nonempty 010, 020, 030, 040, 050 docs with exact paths and activation tests; independent A verdict
criteria.capturedEvidence: commit b419045; docs_check=PASS for 000 plus nonempty 010/020/030/040/050, 13 relative links, exact activation tests; independent GPT-5.6 Sol high/priority 008_audit_final.md VERDICT: PASS blockers=0

criteria.scenario: Roadmap is OpenAI-only and records HOTL bounds and terminal outcomes
criteria.expectedEvidence: Plan scope table and audit confirmation that excluded providers/features/push remain out
criteria.capturedEvidence: 000_plan.md scope/HOTL bounds verified; production_files=0 in b419045; final Sol audit confirmed OpenAI-only exclusions and no push/release/deploy

criteria.scenario: Tier/migration/catalog foundations exist without exposing Multi before route-aware auth
criteria.expectedEvidence: Focused tests for pure helpers plus registry/preset/catalog snapshots proving no public Multi activation in Cycle 010
criteria.capturedEvidence: commit 3f6caeb; focused foundation/migration/catalog 73 pass 0 fail; registry/router/config regression 73 pass 0 fail; tsc exit 0; Sol high/priority implementation PASS; explicit zero-network gather and registry/preset/init/default config assertions prove no public openai-multi activation

criteria.scenario: Direct, Multi, and API are distinct canonical providers
criteria.expectedEvidence: Registry/router/preset tests proving ids, labels, auth kinds, and account modes
criteria.capturedEvidence: commits 3a9e498f/005cbb8 and final focused receipts prove reserved openai Direct, openai-multi pool, and openai-apikey key-only identities

criteria.scenario: Legacy pool users preserve behavior once without resurrecting removed Multi config
criteria.expectedEvidence: Migration activation and negative tests including no credential copying
criteria.capturedEvidence: 050_e2e.json migrationRestore PASS; separate child proves mode-0600 no-replace backup, restore, remigration, idempotence, and hidden legacy id

criteria.scenario: Configured Multi exposes the Codex-native model family as namespaced rows
criteria.expectedEvidence: Catalog tests proving native-source projection, metadata parity, caps, disable behavior, and no API-source leakage
criteria.capturedEvidence: Cycle 020 catalog suite plus canonical E2E prove openai-multi native-source namespaced rows, caps, disable behavior, and no API leakage

criteria.scenario: Direct cannot resolve or mutate pool state even when an active pool account exists
criteria.expectedEvidence: HTTP/WS/unit activation tests with pool spies and caller-header capture
criteria.capturedEvidence: HTTP/WS canonical E2E and auth-context suites prove Direct forwards caller ownership only and leaves pool state untouched

criteria.scenario: Multi includes main and added accounts with affinity, quota, cooldown, failover, and outcomes
criteria.expectedEvidence: Main-selection and added-account fault-injection tests plus outcome assertions
criteria.capturedEvidence: 050_e2e.json proves main eligibility, added-account 429 cooldown, next-turn main failover, affinity and outcome state

criteria.scenario: WebSocket frames and remote compact use the selected provider tier
criteria.expectedEvidence: Frame-switch registry tests and compact auth failure/no-fallback tests
criteria.capturedEvidence: 050_e2e.json records four sequential real WebSocket turns and four compact cases with exact selected tier and no public-network fallback

criteria.scenario: GPT-5.6 API rows use official context, max input, modalities, and supported effort intersection
criteria.expectedEvidence: Catalog assertions for 1050000 context, 922000 auto-compact ceiling, text/image, low-max
criteria.capturedEvidence: commit 42e958f and Cycle 030 catalog tests prove 1050000 context, 922000 max input, text/image and low-max API rows

criteria.scenario: Exactly three API-only Pro virtual ids map to base model plus reasoning.mode=pro
criteria.expectedEvidence: Captured outbound requests for Sol/Terra/Luna Pro and negative unknown/base/provider cases
criteria.capturedEvidence: Cycle 030 transport tests and 050 E2E prove exactly Sol/Terra/Luna Pro virtual ids, base-model outbound rewrite, and reasoning.mode=pro

criteria.scenario: OpenAI API requests use API keys only
criteria.expectedEvidence: Transport tests proving no Codex bearer/account headers and API key pool behavior only
criteria.capturedEvidence: API transport and runtime client-history receipts prove openai-apikey uses API authorization only with no Codex account headers

criteria.scenario: GUI and management surfaces present the same three-tier contract
criteria.expectedEvidence: API tests, all-locale lint, GUI build, and rendered browser evidence
criteria.capturedEvidence: commit 9bba360 plus 85 focused GUI/API tests, i18n/build, and four inspected EN/KO responsive screenshots prove three fixed tier cards

criteria.scenario: Search and image sidecars choose Direct then Multi fallback deterministically
criteria.expectedEvidence: Insertion-order-independent activation tests for Direct, disabled/absent Direct, Multi, and API headers
criteria.capturedEvidence: sidecar tests and reverse-insertion E2E prove deterministic Direct then Multi candidates, keyed API isolation, and owned auth failures

criteria.scenario: All relevant automated gates pass on the final tree
criteria.expectedEvidence: Fresh bun x tsc --noEmit, bun test, GUI lint:i18n and build outputs with exit 0
criteria.capturedEvidence: 050_gate_summary.txt records all 13 commands exit 0; final full isolated suite is 2760 pass 0 fail; privacy, tsc, GUI and docs builds pass

criteria.scenario: README and model catalog documentation match implemented behavior
criteria.expectedEvidence: Diff review and link/path checks for README.md, docs/codex-app-model-catalog.md, docs/README.md
criteria.capturedEvidence: README EN/KO/ZH, maintained docs-site EN/KO/ZH, structure/08 and chase notes are synchronized; docs build and scoped diff check exit 0

criteria.scenario: Actual runtime proves Direct and Multi and records honest API smoke status
criteria.expectedEvidence: Restart identity plus sanitized Direct/Multi receipts; API base/Pro receipts or NOT RUN credential unavailable with mock proof
criteria.capturedEvidence: 050_runtime_smoke.json and 050_client_history.json prove two cold starts, real temp-home codex exec API-Pro activation, Direct/Multi ownership, unchanged user hashes; live key unavailable with zero calls
